questions.question: Describe the primary difference between Stochastic Gradient Descent (SGD) and Mini-Batch Gradient Descent. How does this difference affect the optimization process of a supervised deep learning network?
questions.hint: Stochastic Gradient Descent and Mini-Batch Gradient Descent

questions.question: What is the role of the learning rate in Gradient Descent-based optimization techniques? Explain how the choice of an inappropriate learning rate can impact the convergence of a deep learning model.

Suppose you are training a supervised deep learning network using Gradient Descent with a convex loss function and a large enough learning rate. Which of the following statements is TRUE about the optimization process?
options: The model will converge to a local minimum.
The model will converge to the global minimum.
The model's weights will remain constant throughout training.
The model's weights will converge to zero.
